project_area: Afterschool and summer programs, STEM education, expanded learning, youth development
demographic_requirements: Primarily serves underserved middle-school youth (varies by specific grant opportunity)
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by funding source but generally includes afterschool, summer, or expanded learning programs serving youth, particularly underserved middle-school populations. Applicants may include nonprofits, schools, government agencies, and community-based organizations.
